---
name: "🚀 Feature Request"
about: Suggest a new idea or enhancement for jatin-lean
title: "[FEATURE] <Short description of the feature>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

### Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (e.g., *I am frustrated when I try to run the optimizer in my CI, but I cannot silence the output...*)

### Describe the Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Explain the proposed CLI flags, Node JS APIs, or internal behaviors.

### Describe Alternatives You've Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

### Additional Context
Add any other context, designs, or examples about the feature request here.
